name: manual_d32675
claim: Tempire UI rule: all shadcn component decorative rings are globally suppressed via CSS in globals.css targeting data-slot attributes. Never add ring-* classes to shadcn components unless Victor explicitly requests an outline. The global rule covers popover-content, dialog-content, sheet-content, dropdown-menu-content, select-content, tooltip-content, and command slots.

decisions.notes: Victor prefers no visible outlines on floating UI components. Rings from shadcn defaults felt like a harsh white border. Global suppression via data-slot selectors is cleaner than adding ring-0 per-component.

rationale: Victor prefers no visible outlines on floating UI components. Rings from shadcn defaults felt like a harsh white border. Global suppression via data-slot selectors is cleaner than adding ring-0 per-component.
